Job Position: Sales Operations Manager

Responsibilities


	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to capture business requirements and implement new sales and customer-related processes
	Optimize existing sales processes, practices, and policies for internal customer satisfaction and employee productivity
	Ensure high levels of data quality and process consistency in sales and marketing systems
	Analyze sales data, take action, and measure impact to support decision-making
	Manage the overall sales tech stack, including Salesforce and other sales tools
	Hire, develop, and manage a high-performing sales operations team


Requirements and Skills


	B.Sc / M.Sc in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field with 0-5 years of experience
	Proven experience in sales operations, business analysis, or sales support management
	Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines
	Excellent interpersonal skills for cross-functional and international collaboration
	Experience with sales tech stack management, particularly Salesforce
	Demonstrated leadership in managing and motivating teams.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr.iraizickifyltd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Sales Operations Manager Job at Iraizickify Business Store




        
    

        
        Iraizickify Business Store is a reliable ICT and business support service provider specializing in company and business registration under the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) in Nigeria. We are committed to helping entrepreneurs, startups, and established businesses formalize and grow their ventures with ease and professionalism.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Operations Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to capture business requirements and implement new sales and customer-related processes
	Optimize existing sales processes, practices, and policies for internal customer satisfaction and employee productivity
	Ensure high levels of data quality and process consistency in sales and marketing systems
	Analyze sales data, take action, and measure impact to support decision-making
	Manage the overall sales tech stack, including Salesforce and other sales tools
	Hire, develop, and manage a high-performing sales operations team


Requirements and Skills


	B.Sc / M.Sc in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field with 0-5 years of experience
	Proven experience in sales operations, business analysis, or sales support management
	Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines
	Excellent interpersonal skills for cross-functional and international collaboration
	Experience with sales tech stack management, particularly Salesforce
	Demonstrated leadership in managing and motivating teams.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "description": "Bolton White Group is a group of hospitality brands providing exceptional services across all our business units. Our team is dedicated to providing a wide range of clients with world-class services. Bolton White Group is well regarded for its focus on international best practices in all aspects of its business. Bolton White Group is an independent entrepreneurial-driven institution offering a complete range of hospitality services with a focus on providing a &lsquo;home away from home&rsquo; experience to our clients. By choosing to join Bolton White Group you have assumed your share of the responsibility for maintaining the high principles and standards to which we are dedicated.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing &amp; Conversion Specialist

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Branding &amp; Communications
Reports to: Head of Brand Strategy

Role Overview


	We are seeking a high-energy, systems-oriented Digital Marketing &amp; Conversion Specialist to join our fast-paced Branding &amp; Communications team.
	This role is the &quot;Growth Engine&quot; of our department. Your primary mission is to take full ownership of our daily social media operations, community engagement, and lead conversion. While our leads handle high-level development and cinematic production, you ensure our digital presence is active, responsive, and profitable.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Management &amp; Daily Operations:


	Full Channel Ownership: Handle the daily posting schedule across all platforms (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) to ensure a consistent and professional brand pulse.
	Community Engagement: Act as the primary &quot;front line&quot;&mdash;responding to every comment and review immediately to build community trust.
	Lead Conversion: Manage all incoming DMs with speed and brand-appropriate tone, proactively turning inquiries into booked leads or sales.


Performance Marketing (Ads Management):


	Execute daily monitoring and optimization of ad campaigns across Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads, and TikTok Ads. ? Use Meta Business Suite and native ad managers to track ROI and ROAS daily.
	Pivot and adjust targeting strategies based on real-time analytics to prevent &quot;ad fatigue&quot; and wasted spend. 3. Content Production &amp; Distribution
	Collaborative Production: Join the core team in the field or studio to assist in producing content (video shoots, photography, and interviews) as demanded by the project workload.
	Email Marketing: Manage the distribution of newsletters and automated sequences using professional Email Marketing Software.
	Lifecycle Management: Ensure all technical assets (blogs, web updates, and videos) reach the intended audience through the right digital channels.


Operations &amp; Reporting:


	Use Notion and Google Workspace to manage content calendars, track tasks, and report on growth metrics.
	Maintain organized documentation of marketing workflows and lead conversion rates. Requirements
	Platform Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of Meta Business Suite, Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads Manager, and TikTok.
	Social Media Native: Deep understanding of platform algorithms, posting best practices, and community management.
	Technical Savvy: Experience with Email Marketing softwares and Google Suite.
	Project Management: Proficiency in Notion for workflow tracking and organization.
	Production Ready: A hands-on attitude toward content shoots and collaborative production environments. Preferred (The &quot;Plus&quot; Skills)
	Experience with Figma for reviewing or adjusting design assets.
	Basic video assembly skills in CapCut or Canva for quick-turnaround social content.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 3-5 years of experience.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Photograph to: jobs@boltonwhitegroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Digital Marketing & Conversion Specialist Job at Bolton White Group




        
    

        
        Bolton White Group is a group of hospitality brands providing exceptional services across all our business units. Our team is dedicated to providing a wide range of clients with world-class services. Bolton White Group is well regarded for its focus on international best practices in all aspects of its business. Bolton White Group is an independent entrepreneurial-driven institution offering a complete range of hospitality services with a focus on providing a ‘home away from home’ experience to our clients. By choosing to join Bolton White Group you have assumed your share of the responsibility for maintaining the high principles and standards to which we are dedicated.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing & Conversion Specialist

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Branding & Communications
Reports to: Head of Brand Strategy

Role Overview


	We are seeking a high-energy, systems-oriented Digital Marketing & Conversion Specialist to join our fast-paced Branding & Communications team.
	This role is the "Growth Engine" of our department. Your primary mission is to take full ownership of our daily social media operations, community engagement, and lead conversion. While our leads handle high-level development and cinematic production, you ensure our digital presence is active, responsive, and profitable.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Management & Daily Operations:


	Full Channel Ownership: Handle the daily posting schedule across all platforms (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) to ensure a consistent and professional brand pulse.
	Community Engagement: Act as the primary "front line"—responding to every comment and review immediately to build community trust.
	Lead Conversion: Manage all incoming DMs with speed and brand-appropriate tone, proactively turning inquiries into booked leads or sales.


Performance Marketing (Ads Management):


	Execute daily monitoring and optimization of ad campaigns across Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads, and TikTok Ads. ? Use Meta Business Suite and native ad managers to track ROI and ROAS daily.
	Pivot and adjust targeting strategies based on real-time analytics to prevent "ad fatigue" and wasted spend. 3. Content Production & Distribution
	Collaborative Production: Join the core team in the field or studio to assist in producing content (video shoots, photography, and interviews) as demanded by the project workload.
	Email Marketing: Manage the distribution of newsletters and automated sequences using professional Email Marketing Software.
	Lifecycle Management: Ensure all technical assets (blogs, web updates, and videos) reach the intended audience through the right digital channels.


Operations & Reporting:


	Use Notion and Google Workspace to manage content calendars, track tasks, and report on growth metrics.
	Maintain organized documentation of marketing workflows and lead conversion rates. Requirements
	Platform Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of Meta Business Suite, Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads Manager, and TikTok.
	Social Media Native: Deep understanding of platform algorithms, posting best practices, and community management.
	Technical Savvy: Experience with Email Marketing softwares and Google Suite.
	Project Management: Proficiency in Notion for workflow tracking and organization.
	Production Ready: A hands-on attitude toward content shoots and collaborative production environments. Preferred (The "Plus" Skills)
	Experience with Figma for reviewing or adjusting design assets.
	Basic video assembly skills in CapCut or Canva for quick-turnaround social content.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 3-5 years of experience. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Photograph to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

	Trydnt is seeking a dynamic, high-calibre executive to take full ownership of our business development engine and daily operations. This dual-impact role requires a rare combination of a relentless growth driver and an organized operational leader.
	As the COO / Head of Business Development, you will be responsible for aggressively expanding Trydnt&rsquo;s market footprint identifying new clients, structuring high-value proposals, and closing deals while simultaneously managing internal staff, optimizing corporate structures, and ensuring seamless daily service delivery.

	Pipeline Generation: Lead the end-to-end market research strategy to identify, target, and secure new corporate, institutional, and public sector clients.

	Market Strategy: Analyze market trends to position Trydnt&rsquo;s service offerings competitively within the regional landscape.

	Internal Structuring: Continually assess and refine Trydnt&rsquo;s internal workflows, reporting lines, and operational policies to maximize productivity and scalability.
	Resource Allocation: Manage project timelines, logistics, and resource distribution to ensure client deliverables are met on time and within budget.


Strategy &amp; Reporting (10%)


	Executive Alignment: Collaborate closely with the Managing Director to translate the company&#39;s long-term vision into actionable operational and sales targets.
	Performance Reporting: Prepare and present comprehensive weekly and monthly reports on business development pipelines, financial health, and operational milestones.


Performance Indicators (KPIs) for Success


	Revenue Growth: Volume and value of new client contracts secured.
	Proposal Win-Rate: Efficiency and success percentage of submitted corporate proposals.
	Operational Efficiency: Improvement in internal project turnaround times and resource utilization.
	Staff Retention &amp; Output: Overall performance index and retention rates of internal team members.

	Experience: 8&ndash;10 years of progressive professional experience, with at least 3&ndash;5 years in a senior leadership capacity (e.g., COO, Business Development Director, General Manager, or Senior Consultant).

	Proven Track Record: Demonstrated success in B2B corporate sales, commercial proposal writing, and navigating complex procurement processes.
	Operational Acumen: Strong experience managing multi-disciplinary teams, restructuring internal processes, and driving operational excellence.
	Local Market Expertise: Deep understanding of the Abuja business ecosystem, including corporate, government, and development-sector networks.
	Core Competencies: Exceptional negotiation skills, flawless written and verbal communication, strategic thinking, and decisive leadership.


Salary
N900,000 - N1,100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Job Summary&nbsp;


	The IT Security Analyst is responsible for protecting the organization&rsquo;s IT systems, networks, and data from cybersecurity threats. The role involves monitoring security tools, analyzing risks, responding to incidents, and ensuring compliance with established security frameworks and policies.


Responsibilities


	Monitor and analyze security alerts using SIEM, firewalls, and IDS/IPS tools
	Detect, investigate, and respond to cybersecurity incidents
	Conduct vulnerability assessments and support penetration testing

	Collaborate with IT teams to secure infrastructure and applications

	Understanding of cybersecurity threats, vulnerabilities, and risk management
	Basic scripting (Python, PowerShell, or Bash) is an advantage


Certifications (Preferred):


	CompTIA Security+
	Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)
	CISSP (for experienced candidates)
	GIAC Security Essentials (GSEC).

Our goal is to enhance financial inclusion by offering a comprehensive suite of services tailored to meet the diverse needs of our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Information Technology Security Analyst

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
